title: npm account confirmation + name ruling
description: Brooks logs into npm (interactive — user action, agents must not attempt); confirm the personal npm username; Team Lead confirms unscoped `to-execution` against the real username. Availability: registry 404 on to-execution, verified 2026-06-07 by Team Lead. Acceptance: `npm whoami` returns the confirmed personal user; unscoped name confirmed by Team Lead.
notes: HITL. PRD-002 P3. Shipped 2026-06-07 (sprint_1 item S1-8): npm whoami = brooksryan, re-verified twice, logged as npm_whoami_verified in tmp/exec/prd-002_progress.json; unscoped to-execution ruling approved with the rename.
